_comment: Curated overrides for tools/gen_oda_conformance.py. sid_ref_remaps fix v25.0 spec references against GB922 v25.5 names; api_module_overrides map TMF APIs to repo addons missing from the README table; component_waivers exclude components with documented reasons.

Product_Domain|ProductOfferingInstance_A._note: spec omits underscores; same ABE in GB922 v25.5

Market_&_Sales_Domain|Market_Sales_Party._note: v25.0 combined Market & Sales ABE was split in v25.5; Sales side is the relevant one for TMFC035 party roles

component_waivers.TMFC062: Component spec folder is empty upstream (no published YAML); wiring implemented as-built per docs/TMFC_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md
